title: stelis pachyphyta
intro: Stelis pachyphyta, also known as the "tree orchid," is a species of orchid native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Stelis pachyphyta include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds. The health benefits of this plant are said to include its ability to aid in the treatment of various health issues, such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Stelis pachyphyta is often used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, which are typically prepared by steeping the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water.
